Kevin Durant OUT for Rockets in Game 1 vs. Lakers** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

Shams Charania of ESPN reported Saturday evening that Kevin Durant will miss Game 1 due to a knee injury, confirmed as a late update ahead of the 8:30 p.m. ET tipoff[1]. This shifts dynamics in the No. 4 Lakers (53-29) vs. No. 5 Rockets (52-30) first-round series, where Houston remains a 4.5-5.5 point favorit
